## Primary Documents

### Magna Carta — Constitutional Document
URL: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1vsA91VtPwfdLhwZpSAPfSovSV4v6NgZmbv-I3UnKFXQ/export?format=txt
GitHub: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/v-ravenheart/okka-magna-carta/main/OKKA_Magna_Carta.md
Description: The constitutional document of the OKKA Forest. Speed 1 — changes when the organism changes what it IS. Always fetch the Google Doc URL for the most current version.
